title: Module 1
content:
Analysis of Steam Cycle
Steam engineering-temperature entropy diagram- mollier diagram-
Rankine cycle-steam power plant, internally irreversible and
externally irreversible Rankine cycle-Mean temperature of heat
addition-Effect of superheat and inlet pressure-Reheating of steam,
Regeneration-Regenerative feed water heating-Feed water heaters-
Efficiencies in a steam power plant-binary vapor cycle

title: Module 4
content:
Energy Storage
Pumped hydro, Compressed air energy storage, flywheel energy
storage, Electrochemical energy storage, magnetic energy storage,
Thermal energy storage, Chemical energy storage

factor-use factor-economics in plant selection-economics of
